title: Ctenodon carichanicus
taxonomy: Ctenodon carichanicus is a plant species classified within the family Celastraceae. This plant is native to South America. The species Ctenodon carichanicus belongs to the genus Ctenodon. The classification is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Rosids, order Celastrales, family Celastraceae, genus Ctenodon, species C. carichanicus. The exact classification may vary depending on the source.

These compounds have been found to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The flavonoids present in Ctenodon carichanicus may also play a role in protecting against cell damage and oxidative stress. Further research is necessary to fully understand the pharmacological effects of Ctenodon carichanicus.
